title: Dehydrated Onion
description: White, red and pink onion in kibbled, chopped, minced, granule and powder cuts   dried from Indian onion for consistent colour and pungency.

description: Dried Indian garlic in flakes, cloves, chopped, minced, granules and powder for seasoning, blends and industrial use.

description: A broad range of dehydrated vegetables   tomato, beetroot, carrot, spinach, capsicum and more   in flakes, granules and powders.

description: Crispy fried onion in golden and brown shades, ready for garnishes, biryani and convenience foods.

title: Black Pepper
description: Whole and ground black pepper in export grades, valued for aroma and piperine strength.

description: Whole and powdered cloves with high oil content, hand-sorted for size and colour.

title: Green Cardamom
description: Green cardamom in multiple bold sizes plus seeds and powder, prized for its sweet, floral aroma.

title: Star Anise
description: Whole star anise with a distinctive liquorice note, for spice blends and beverages.

description: Dried ginger   whole, split and powder   pungent and warming for culinary and wellness use.

description: Cumin, fennel, coriander, mustard, sesame, flax, ajwain, chia and fenugreek   whole seeds and select powders.

title: Spice Powders
description: Single-origin ground spices, milled to a fine, consistent particle size and colour.

title: Spice Leaves & Herbs
description: Dried culinary herbs and leaves   mint, curry leaf, kasuri methi, basil, oregano, thyme, rosemary and mixed blends.

title: Herbal Powders
description: Plant-based herbal powders   ashwagandha, moringa, spirulina, amla, triphala and more   for nutraceutical and personal-care use.

title: Dehydrated Fruit Powders
description: Air-dried fruit powders that retain natural colour and flavour for beverages, bakery and blends.

description: Free-flowing spray-dried fruit powders for instant beverages, dairy, bakery and confectionery.

title: Spray Dried Ripe Banana Pulp Powder
Spray-Dried Vegetables

description: Psyllium husk and powder in export grades, valued for high fibre and mucilage content.

title: Red Chilli Flakes
description: Crushed red chilli and flakes in varying heat and colour for pizzerias, snacks and blends.

title: Indian Spices
description: Everyday Indian spices   chilli, turmeric, cumin, mustard, coriander and pepper   whole and ground.

title: Coriander
description: Whole and split coriander seed with a fresh, citrusy aroma.

title: Reactive Dyes
description: Reactive dyes for cotton, viscose and cellulosic fibres   P series, VS, bi-functional, cold-brand and high-exhaust ranges.

title: Direct Dyes
description: Non-benzidine direct dyes for cotton, paper and leather across a full shade range.

title: Acid Dyes
description: Acid, acid-milling, 1:2 metal-complex and chrome (mordant) dyes for wool, silk, nylon and leather.

title: Food Colours
description: Synthetic, blended, lake, natural and D&C colours for food, beverage, pharmaceutical and cosmetic use.

Pigments

hero.heading: A trusted bridge between Indian growers and global buyers.
hero.sub: Premium agricultural and food ingredients, sourced and processed in India, exported with the documentation and care global trade demands.

intro.heading: A broad-spectrum food-ingredient partner, built on trust.
intro.body: Traya International Exim LLP is a dynamic, globally oriented export house delivering premium agricultural and food-processing products from India to international markets.

productsSection.heading: Thirty categories, one accountable partner.
productsSection.sub: From dehydrated alliums to spray-dried powders, whole and ground spices, culinary herbs, herbal & nutraceutical powders, and industrial chemicals, dyes and colours. Browse by what you make.

why.heading: The discipline of a trading house, the care of a founder.

finalCta.heading: Ready to source from India?
finalCta.sub: Bulk volumes, custom packaging, full documentation. Tell us what you need and we will usually respond within one business day.

heading: About Us
tagline: A Refined Approach to Global Trade

children.text: Traya International EXIM is a global trade firm built on precision, structure, and disciplined execution. We operate across international markets with a clear focus   to facilitate seamless import and export operations while building long-term, high-value global relationships.

We are a modern, forward-looking trade enterprise that combines operational strength with a global outlook, facilitating both exports and imports across diverse product categories aligned with international standards.

vision: To become the most trusted and largest trading partner for businesses expanding across borders.
mission: To facilitate efficient and well-structured export and import operations across global markets
To build and strengthen long-term international trade partnerships and provide sustainable solutions
To ensure seamless execution through disciplined systems and operational clarity
To expand our global presence through strategic market engagement
To uphold the highest standards of professionalism, reliability, quality, transparency and consistency

philosophy.title: Clarity
philosophy.description: Knowing where and how to operate.

capabilities.title: Export & Import Operations
capabilities.description: A comprehensive, end-to-end approach   from initial planning to final delivery, every stage handled with attention to detail and operational control.

capabilities.title: Global Market Positioning
capabilities.description: Aligning products with the right regions, demand cycles, and trade environments to enable entry and expansion across international markets.

capabilities.title: International Client & Partner Network
capabilities.description: A network spanning multiple geographies, built on credibility and long-term, growth-oriented association.

capabilities.title: Trade Execution & Coordination
capabilities.description: Overseeing the entire execution cycle   documentation, regulatory alignment, and logistics coordination   so transactions move efficiently across borders.

capabilities.title: Strategic Trade Direction
capabilities.description: Structured thinking in every aspect of trade, enabling clear decision-making and consistent global positioning.
